channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The 1953 Glasspar G2 Roadster and Its Role in Launching America’s Fiberglass Sports Car Era
item.description: The 1953 Glasspar G2 Roadster occupies a significant place in American automotive history as one of the earliest production sports cars to use a fiberglass body. Created by designer Bill Tritt and man...

item.title: NHS Approves Teplizumab to Delay the Onset of Type 1 Diabetes in High-Risk Patients
item.description: The UK's National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE) has approved teplizumab, a groundbreaking treatment that can delay the onset of type 1 diabetes by an average of nearly three years in...

item.title: Analysis Argues JD Vance Could Play a Key Role in Any Future Effort by Trump to Seek Legal Protection After Leaving Office
item.description: The article discusses an opinion analysis written by Mark Green, president of the New Democracy Project, regarding the political relationship between President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance...

item.title: Analysis Argues Supreme Court's 'Colorblind Constitution' Doctrine Could Reshape Civil Rights Protections
item.description: A recent analysis by Slate legal writer Mark Joseph Stern examines the potential consequences of a June 2 Supreme Court order that described the U.S. Constitution as 'colorblind.' The unsigned 6-3 rul...

item.title: Messi scores twice to break World Cup scoring records as Argentina secure knockout-stage place
item.description: Argentina secured their place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage with a 2-0 victory over Austria in Group J, thanks to another outstanding performance from Lionel Messi. The 38-year-old captain...

item.title: Young girl dies after speeding car crashes into religious tent in Karachi DHA injuring multiple people
item.description: In a tragic incident on Sunday night in Karachi's Defence Housing Authority Phase 6 near Saba Avenue, a speeding car lost control and crashed into a tent set up for a religious gathering at an imambar...

item.description: Comedian and television host John Oliver used a recent episode of HBO's 'Last Week Tonight' to criticize President Donald Trump's comments about former President Barack Obama and to challenge aspects ...

item.title: Two Men Denied Bail After Alleged Riot and Vehicle Arson in Yuendumu
item.description: Two men have been denied bail after being charged in connection with a violent disturbance that occurred in the remote Central Australian community of Yuendumu. Northern Territory Police responded to ...

item.title: Opinion Column Argues U.S. Media Softens Coverage of Trump While Highlighting Criticism from an Italian Newspaper
item.description: In this opinion article, commentator Thom Hartmann discusses a controversy involving U.S. President Donald Trump and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni. Hartmann recounts how the Italian conservati...

item.title: Republican Congressional Candidate Criticized for Incorrectly Claiming James Comey Had Felony Convictions
item.description: Republican congressional candidate Michael Carbonara faced criticism after posting inaccurate information on social media regarding former FBI Director James Comey. Carbonara claimed that FBI Director...

item.title: Commentators Question Susan Collins' Performance in Pre-Taped Fox News Interview Amid Tight Maine Senate Race
item.description: A Fox News interview featuring Senator Susan Collins of Maine sparked widespread discussion online after viewers and political commentators observed what they described as an unusually hesitant and un...

item.title: Steve Schmidt Criticizes Trump Administration Over Economy, Foreign Policy, and National Division
item.description: The article reports on comments made by Steve Schmidt, a former Republican strategist and longtime critic of Donald Trump. In a video statement, Schmidt argued that the United States is experiencing s...

item.title: Tony Modra Recovering After Serious Truck Accident, Family Says Further Treatment Is Needed
item.description: Australian football great Tony Modra is continuing his recovery after suffering serious facial injuries in a truck accident near his farm south of Adelaide. The accident occurred when a fallen tree br...

item.title: Opinion Writer Criticizes Trump's Foreign Policy and Warns About Expanding Military Conflicts
item.description: In this opinion piece, Tom Engelhardt argues that the public and media are overlooking what he considers a critical question about President Donald Trump's foreign policy: which country the United Sta...

item.title: Paul Krugman Warns Trump’s Iran Policy and Economic Claims Could Damage U.S. Global Standing
item.description: Nobel Prize-winning economist Paul Krugman argued that the consequences of President Donald Trump’s handling of the conflict with Iran could have long-lasting effects on the United States’ internation...

item.title: Alan Dershowitz Scheduled to Testify Before House Committee Investigating Jeffrey Epstein Case
item.description: Alan Dershowitz, a prominent defense attorney and former lawyer for Donald Trump, is expected to appear before the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on July 20 as part of the committee’s...

item.title: PPP's Amjad Hussain Becomes Gilgit-Baltistan Chief Minister as Coalition Partners Back Unopposed Elections
item.description: Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) leader Advocate Amjad Hussain was elected unopposed as the new Chief Minister of Gilgit-Baltistan after no other candidate submitted nomination papers for the position. Wi...

item.title: Rare 1976 Portrait Session Captured Meryl Streep Before Her Rise to International Fame
item.description: The article revisits a notable portrait session conducted by acclaimed photographer Jack Mitchell in New York City in August 1976, featuring a young Meryl Streep at the beginning of her career. At the...

item.title: CNN Reports Continued Problems and Rising Costs in Trump's Reflecting Pool Renovation Project
item.description: CNN correspondent Tom Foreman provided an update on the ongoing controversy surrounding the renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, a project promoted by President Donald Trump. The renova...

item.title: Egypt Forced to Return to Spokane After Security Officials Reject Seattle Stay Request Ahead of Iran Match
item.description: Egypt's national football team confirmed that their request to remain in Seattle after defeating New Zealand at the 2026 FIFA World Cup was rejected by local security authorities. The Pharaohs had jus...
